case_title: JULIA LEE ET AL VS. TONY TONG DBA SUMMIT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JULIA LEE AND JAMES BARTON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONY TONG DBA SUMMIT CONSTRUCTION CO., REPRESENTED BY TONY TONG, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFEID CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
